vocab.example: I find that my cognitive performance reaches its zenith shortly after my first cup of coffee in the morning.

vocab.meaning: kiểu thời gian sinh học (xu hướng thức khuya hay dậy sớm)
vocab.example: Being an 'early bird' chronotype, I naturally gravitate toward intense study sessions before noon.
Scheduling my most difficult modules during my peak alertness in the morning ensures better retention of information.

vocab.meaning: hiệu suất giảm dần (càng làm càng kém hiệu quả)
vocab.example: Studying late in the afternoon often leads to a point of diminishing returns where I read without absorbing anything.
The morning provides an optimal window for creative writing because my mind isn't yet cluttered with daily stress.
Forcing myself to study in the afternoon feels like I am fighting against my natural circadian rhythm.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi về tinh thần
vocab.example: By the time the afternoon rolls around, mental fatigue starts to set in, making it hard to concentrate on complex tasks.

vocab.meaning: được nghỉ ngơi đầy đủ, sảng khoái
vocab.example: I am most productive when I am well-rested, which is why the early hours are my preferred time for revision.
The morning offers a distraction-free environment, as most people haven't started their busy schedules yet.

vocab.meaning: dễ tiếp thu, sẵn sàng đón nhận kiến thức
vocab.example: My brain is far more receptive to new concepts when I first wake up compared to the sluggish afternoon hours.
